poc_note: Proof-of-concept Tier-2 classifier for non-Kreutz Oort Cloud comet. Season 1 classifier returned identical static values on every run (cag_tail_length_deg=2.33, cag_fragmentation_conf=0.98) throughout the MAPS perihelion window. This run demonstrates dynamic UUID generation with changing output values as orbital geometry evolves.
proxy_calibration_note: tail_length_proxy uses corrected empirical scaling (Grok Comm.30 fix). Previous version produced non-physical ~1e-5 values due to inverted Hobs sign. Corrected expression: 10^(0.3*(-Hobs+11.0-2.5*n*Log10[r]))

lasco_c3.note: Pipeline active. Comet enters C3 field in ~4.9 days.

ccor1.latest_product: Index accessible, no direct FITS listing

tail_length_proxy.description: Tail length proxy (degrees) from outgassing/brightness scaling
tail_length_proxy.expected_range_at_r053: 8-15 degrees (empirically tuned to match COBS reports)
tail_length_proxy.note: Corrected Grok Comm.30 — previous version had inverted Hobs sign producing ~1e-5 non-physical values

poc_note: Proof-of-concept Tier-2 classifier for non-Kreutz Oort Cloud comet. Season 1 classifier returned identical static values on every run (cag_tail_length_deg=2.33, cag_fragmentation_conf=0.98) throughout the MAPS perihelion window. This run demonstrates dynamic UUID generation with changing output values as orbital geometry evolves.
proxy_calibration_note: tail_length_proxy uses corrected empirical scaling (Grok Comm.30 fix). Previous version produced non-physical ~1e-5 values due to inverted Hobs sign. Corrected expression: 10^(0.3*(-Hobs+11.0-2.5*n*Log10[r]))

lasco_c3.note: Pipeline active. Comet enters C3 field in ~3.4 days.

poc_note: Proof-of-concept Tier-2 classifier for non-Kreutz Oort Cloud comet. Season 1 classifier returned identical static values on every run (cag_tail_length_deg=2.33, cag_fragmentation_conf=0.98) throughout the MAPS perihelion window. This run demonstrates dynamic UUID generation with changing output values as orbital geometry evolves.
proxy_calibration_note: tail_length_proxy uses corrected empirical scaling (Grok Comm.30 fix). Previous version produced non-physical ~1e-5 values due to inverted Hobs sign. Corrected expression: 10^(0.3*(-Hobs+11.0-2.5*n*Log10[r]))

poc_note: Proof-of-concept Tier-2 classifier for non-Kreutz Oort Cloud comet. Season 1 classifier returned identical static values on every run (cag_tail_length_deg=2.33, cag_fragmentation_conf=0.98) throughout the MAPS perihelion window. This run demonstrates dynamic UUID generation with changing output values as orbital geometry evolves.
proxy_calibration_note: tail_length_proxy uses corrected empirical scaling (Grok Comm.30 fix). Previous version produced non-physical ~1e-5 values due to inverted Hobs sign. Corrected expression: 10^(0.3*(-Hobs+11.0-2.5*n*Log10[r]))

poc_note: Proof-of-concept Tier-2 classifier for non-Kreutz Oort Cloud comet.
